subcodes.first_line: O selfless lover of the Traceless Friend! A thousand mystics have sought that Friend, and have yet remained deprived and distant
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جانفشان یار بی نشان هزاران عارفان در جستجوی او ولی محروم و مهجور از روی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @love as fire, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
